query:
SELECT t.id, t.title, t.assignedTo, u.name, u.email 
FROM tasks t 
JOIN users u ON t.assignedTo = u.id 
WHERE u.email LIKE '%test%' OR u.email LIKE '%bulk%' OR u.email LIKE '%promote%' 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT t.id, t.title, t.assignedTo, u.name, u.email 
FROM tasks t 
JOIN users u ON t.assignedTo = u.id 
WHERE u.email LIKE '%test%' OR u.email LIKE '%bulk%' OR u.email LIKE '%promote%' 
LIMIT 10;
